name: crawl_page
description: Crawls a web page and returns its HTML content. Use this skill when you need to fetch the raw HTML of a URL for further processing, analysis, or extraction. Supports custom headers and timeout configuration.

url.description: The URL of the web page to crawl. Must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. Default is 30.

headers.description: Optional custom HTTP headers to send with the request (e.g., User-Agent).
